name: flarum
title: Flarum Forum
description: Modern, fast, and free community forum platform. Includes a built-in MariaDB database by default, or connect to your own external MySQL server. Extensible with plugins, automatic extension updates, and Traefik-ready.

variables.name: FLARUM_SITE_URL
variables.label: Site URL
variables.description: Public URL of the forum (e.g. https://forum.example.com)

variables.name: FLARUM_ADMIN_EMAIL
variables.label: Admin Email
variables.description: Email address for the admin account

variables.name: FLARUM_PORT
variables.label: HTTP Port
variables.description: Host port for the Flarum web interface

variables.name: FLARUM_DB_TYPE
variables.label: Database
variables.description: Use the built-in MariaDB or connect to your own MySQL server

variables.name: FLARUM_DB_HOST
variables.label: MySQL Host
variables.description: Hostname or IP of your MySQL server

variables.name: FLARUM_DB_ROOT_PASS
variables.label: MariaDB Root Password
variables.description: Root password for the built-in MariaDB (auto-generated if empty)
